data.content: Shipment review: merge commit eb59d3d6 confirmed on origin/main. Final verification: (1) audit grep #2 returns zero unsanctioned hits; (2) all four quality gates green on the merge commit; (3) AC-B1 through AC-B5 satisfied; (4) AC-COMMON umbrella foolery-2e97 AC-6 will pass once both this and the already-shipped sibling foolery-11b1 are combined. No surprises during shipment. Ready to terminal.
